metadata.title: Guilherme | Portfolio
metadata.description: Professional portfolio of Guilherme Machado, web developer.

hero.title: About Me
hero.bio: I'm a web developer passionate about building innovative and functional digital solutions. With experience across a range of technologies, I'm always eager to learn and apply best practices to deliver high-quality projects.
hero.frontendDesc: Experience with React, Next.js, HTML5, CSS3, Tailwind CSS and other modern technologies to build responsive and appealing interfaces.
hero.backendDesc: Knowledge of Node.js, Express, RESTful APIs and database integration to build robust and scalable applications.

projects.title: Projects
projects.moreDesc: Visit my GitHub to see more projects and contributions to the open source community.

skills.title: Skills
skills.frontendDesc: Specialized in building modern, responsive and accessible interfaces with the latest technologies.
skills.backendDesc: Experience building robust and scalable APIs, focused on performance and security.
skills.devopsDesc: Knowledge of modern development practices, testing and continuous deployment.

experience.title: Professional Experience
experience.proj1Desc: Development of a system to capture public procurement bids.
experience.proj2Desc: A Linktree clone built as practice and for personal use.

contact.title: Contact
contact.name: Name
contact.subject: Subject
contact.letsChatDesc: I'm available for freelance projects, job opportunities, or just to exchange ideas about technology.
contact.availabilityLine2: I respond to emails and messages within 24 hours.
contact.contactPreferenceValue: For professional matters, I prefer contact by email or LinkedIn. For quick chats, feel free to reach me on WhatsApp.
contact.toastRateLimitDesc: Please wait a minute before trying again.
contact.toastSuccessDesc: Thanks for reaching out. I'll reply soon.

contact.toastConnErrorDesc: Could not connect to the server. Check your internet or try again later.
